rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped literature citation when the authors summarize prior work on relative performance schemes and rank-order contracts. The citing paper does not discuss Lim et al. (2009) separately, does not borrow its empirical design or measures, and does not build hypotheses or identification around it. Its functional role is background positioning of a broader literature stream that the paper then distinguishes from its own focus on homogeneous commissions and composition choice.
